speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] Right then, let's start with some fantastic environmental news that's got us pretty chuffed! Down in Houston, Texas, they've just unveiled some groundbreaking new air quality monitors in the Fifth Ward - that's a community that's been fighting for cleaner air for years. <cite index='7-1,7-2'>These new monitors are being called 'a historic step toward environmental justice and healthier air for families who have waited far too long,' and they're going to provide crucial data to help push for stronger regulations</cite>.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] That's brilliant news, mate! And speaking of environmental wins, here's something that'll put a spring in your step if you're thinking about going electric. <cite index='7-3,7-4,7-5'>Dealers are offering major discounts to clear high inventory of EVs, with experts saying it's a really good time to buy an electric car</cite>. Even with petrol prices hitting over four bucks a gallon, the savings are there for the taking.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] And here's the cherry on top - <cite index='7-6'>while federal tax credits on electric vehicles have expired, many states are still offering incentives to bring down those upfront costs, and you've got until June 30th to grab federal incentives for installing a home EV charger</cite>. Sometimes the stars just align, don't they?
